page_header.label: MULTI-SIG
page_header.title: Shared Control, Confidential Execution
page_header.description: Multiple signers must approve before funds release. Perfect for DAO treasuries, company funds, and shared accounts with configurable M-of-N thresholds.

paragraphs: Multi-signature payments require multiple approvers to sign off before funds can be released, providing security through distributed control while maintaining complete privacy through stealth address execution.

Unlike traditional multi-sig wallets where all signatures and transactions are public, ZKIRA multi-sig keeps the approval process confidential. Only the final release appears on-chain through a stealth address, hiding amounts, timing, and recipient identity.

items: M-of-N Threshold: Configure how many signatures are required (e.g., 2-of-3, 3-of-5)
Private Approval: Signatures collected off-chain before final execution
Stealth Release: Final payment through private stealth address

paragraphs: Escrow requires 2-of-3 approvals before release. Once threshold is met, payment executes privately through stealth address. Third approver signature is optional since threshold is already satisfied.

items.title: DAO Treasury
items.description: Secure large treasury funds with distributed approval from key stakeholders. Prevent single points of failure while maintaining spending privacy.

items.title: Company Funds
items.description: Require multiple executives to approve large expenditures. Perfect for payroll, vendor payments, and strategic investments with confidential amounts.

items.title: Shared Accounts
items.description: Joint custody for partnerships, family trusts, or investment groups. Multiple parties must agree before funds can be spent or transferred.

items: Configurable Threshold: Set any M-of-N combination (2-of-3, 3-of-5, 5-of-7, etc.)
On-Chain Approval Tracking: Transparent signature collection with cryptographic verification
Time-Locked Expiry: Optional expiration dates to prevent stale approvals
Private Execution: Final payment through stealth address maintains confidentiality
Flexible Approvers: Add or remove signers with existing approver consensus
Emergency Recovery: Built-in mechanisms for lost key scenarios

sections.title: Set Up Multi-Sig
sections.description: Secure high-value funds with distributed control. Create a multi-signature escrow with your team, board, or partners.
